msg: warning: Variable line is used uninitialized!
reasoning: The tool reports 'line' as used uninitialized at line 12 when CONFIG_FEATURE_REMOTE_LOG is defined. However, 'line' is declared as 'static char line[512]', which means it has static storage duration and is zero-initialized by default in C. Furthermore, line 11 explicitly calls memset(&line, 0, sizeof(line)) immediately before line is used at line 12. There is no uninitialized use. The vbdb-documented bug for this file (192c35f) is an UnusedVariable with config !FEATURE_REMOTE_LOG — the opposite presence condition — reporting that line is unused when the macro is not defined. The tool has both the wrong bug type and wrong presence condition. False positive.
